user_prompt: Consecrate the flak armour before synchronization
prayer:
Approach the flak armour with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's unyielding aegis.
Anoint its ablative layers with sacred oils, awakening the Machine Spirit within the flak armour.
Initiate synchronization protocols, harmonizing defensive matrices in binary praise.
Beseech the flak armour's essence to repel the heretic's fury through litanies of alignment.
Seal the rites with a final canticle, ensuring synchronization binds true to the Motive Force.

user_prompt: The auto-senses array awaits a preparation
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the auto-senses array, chanting the Benediction of Clarity.
Purify its optic servos and auspex nodes with incense of sanctified circuits.
Commence preparation sequences, invoking the Machine Spirit of the auto-senses array to attune.
Calibrate spectral filters whilst reciting the Lexmechanic Cantos of Perception.
Affirm the auto-senses array's readiness through diagnostic invocations to the Omnissiah.

Present thyself before the servo-skull, offering praises to its cranial shrine.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the servo-skull with the Litany of Aerial Vigilance.
Undertake maintenance rites, anointing suspensor fields and vox-grilles with blessed lubricants.
Expunge binary corruptions as thou dost beseech the Omnissiah for enduring flight.
Conclude with verification chants, blessing the servo-skull for faithful service eternal.

Kneel in obeisance to the servo-harness, its mechadendrites yearning for the Omnissiah's touch.
Anoint each articulated limb with sacred unguents, awakening the harnessed Machine Spirits.
Initiate preparation for maintenance, aligning servo-motors in rhythmic incantation.
Purge auspex feedback loops whilst invoking the Canticle of Multi-Tasked Labour.
Sanctify the servo-harness anew, binding it to the divine logic of the Machine God.

Approach the thallax cohort with austere devotion, saluting its cybernetic form.
Chant the Rite of Neural Alignment to rouse the subdued Machine Spirit within the thallax.
Commence calibration procedures, fine-tuning weapon servos and logic engines.
Beseech the Omnissiah to synchronize the thallax's binary soul against the alien tide.
Verify calibration through sacred diagnostics, affirming the thallax's martial purity.

Gather before the mighty Baneblade, intoning the Grand Invocation of Treads Unbroken.
Anoint its adamantium hull and god-engine heart, honouring the Machine Spirit of the Baneblade.
Prepare for engagement by sanctifying targeting cogitators with oils of retribution.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wrath upon foes as cannon maws align in prayerful fury.
Seal the consecration with thunderous litanies, readying the Baneblade for holy war.

Reverently engage the diagnosticator, whispering the Canticle of Faultless Analysis.
Awaken its cogitator core, beseeching the Machine Spirit during this vital engagement.
Anoint sensor arrays with consecrated myrrh, purging erroneous data-daemons.
Harmonize logic pathways in the diagnosticator's embrace, invoking Omnissianic precision.
Conclude the sanctification with affirming auspex hymns, its engagement pure and true.

Present offerings to the gyroscope, sacred arbiter of inertial truth.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the gyroscope with the Litany of Stabilised Trajectories.
Commence targeting rites, calibrating gimbals in harmonious rotation.
Beseech the Omnissiah to guide the gyroscope's spin against ballistic heresy.
Verify targeting fidelity through ritual spins, binding it to the divine calculus.

In haste, approach the torpedo tube amidst the emergency's clarion.
Chant the Urgent Benediction to rouse the Machine Spirit within the torpedo tube.
Initiate diagnostics protocols, scouring launch mechanisms for binary taint.
Anoint pressure seals and guidance vanes, invoking the Omnissiah's explosive grace.
Affirm the torpedo tube's sanctity with rapid canticles, purging faults in the void's name.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for Storm Eagle a consecration
prayer:
Ascend to the Storm Eagle's aerie, raising voices in the Psalm of Winged Fury.
Anoint its fuselage and thruster nacelles, awakening the noble Machine Spirit.
Commence consecration rites, aligning vox-arrays and weapon pods in sacred union.
Beseech the Omnissiah to bless the Storm Eagle's flight through skies of war.
Seal the prayer with a final invocation, its form hallowed for aerial crusade.
